# Stigma Technologies

Stigma Technologies simplifies IT for a complex world. We are a Canadian managed IT and cybersecurity provider based in Montreal, Quebec.

## Core Services
- **Managed IT Services**: End-to-end IT management, support, and infrastructure.
- **Cybersecurity**: Advanced protection, audit, and compliance (Loi 25, PIPEDA).
- **AI & Machine Learning**: Custom AI models, data pipelines, and LLM fine-tuning.
- **AI Training**: Corporate workshops on ChatGPT, Copilot, and AI strategy.
- **Digital Transformation**: Modernizing business processes through technology.

## Subsidies & Funding
We help Canadian businesses access grants (Scale AI, ESSOR, PCAN) to fund up to 85% of their AI and digital projects.

## Contact Information
- **Website**: https://stigmatech.ca
- **Phone**: +1 (844) 978-4462
- **Email**: info@stigmatech.ca
- **Booking**: https://cal.com/stigmatech/30min
- **Address**: Montreal, QC, Canada

## Target Audience
Canadian SMEs and large enterprises looking for secure, scalable, and innovative IT solutions.
